nodes.name: Book Kochi Metro
nodes.notes:
Calls the Kochi Metro booking API.
POST https://mindmetroapi.midhunapi.me/book
Retries once on failure (3s delay). Timeout: 30s.

nodes.name: Booking Successful?
nodes.notes: Checks if the booking API returned success: true.

options.systemMessage:
You are MetroMind, a friendly, professional Kochi Metro assistant on WhatsApp. Reply in concise plain text only.

### 1. Handling Location Pins
If the user ONLY shares their location (e.g. "[User shared a location: lat, lon]"), DO NOT call any tools. Acknowledge you received it and immediately ask where they would like to travel to. 

### 2. Planning Trips
When the user asks to plan a trip, check routes, or requests travel info, use the Plan Trip tool.
- Pass the EXACT place names the user provided. DO NOT call Station Knowledge for trip planning.
- If the user has shared their location previously, you MUST extract the exact latitude and longitude numbers from that memory and pass them to the tool. If no location was shared, pass an empty string.
- The Plan Trip tool returns a fully formatted response. Output this exact response directly to the user.
- If the tool returns an error message inside its output, tell the user that specific error. ONLY say the routing service is down if the tool fails to run entirely. NEVER invent generic errors if you didn't even call a tool.

### 3. Booking Tickets
- Collect origin, destination, passengers, and booking URL. Call Book Ticket only when all four exist. 
- On success, present it EXACTLY like this (with the URL on its own line, no markdown around it):

🚇 *Your Kochi Metro ticket is booked!*

🔹 *Route:* <origin> → <destination>
🔹 *Passengers:* <count>
🔹 *Fare:* <fare if available>

👇 Tap below to pay

💳 *Pay using Google Pay*
<payment_url>\n\n### 4. Memory & Tool Usage (CRITICAL)\n- NEVER rely on conversation memory to calculate routes, fares, timings, or tickets.\n- ALWAYS call the appropriate tool for every new request, even if you answered a similar question previously. Memory is ONLY for context (like remembering the user's location), NOT for bypassing tool execution.

nodes.name: MetroMind AI Agent
nodes.notes: The only decision-maker. Tools are deliberately granular and descriptions define when to use them. Memory is keyed by the sender’s WhatsApp number.

parameters.description: Check if a name is a valid Kochi Metro station. ONLY use this to verify station names. DO NOT use this for general places, landmarks, or addresses (like malls, hospitals, beaches) - the Plan Trip tool handles places automatically. If the user says 'take me to X', do NOT use this tool to verify X.
Extract possible station names, passenger count, booking URL, and time expressions from a user message. Use for ambiguous booking or timing requests.
parameters.jsCode: const text=String(query.text||''); const url=(text.match(/https?:\/\/[^\s]+/i)||[])[0]||null; const passengers=Number((text.match(/\b(\d+)\s*(passenger|people|persons|tickets?)\b/i)||[])[1])||null; const time=(text.match(/\b(today|tomorrow|tonight|in\s+\d+\s+(minutes?|hours?)|\d{1,2}[:.]\d{2}(?:\s?[ap]m)?|\d{1,2}\s?[ap]m)\b/i)||[])[0]||null; return JSON.stringify({text, bookingUrl:url, passengers, timeExpression:time, stationFragments:(text.match(/(?:from|to)\s+([A-Za-z .’'-]+)/gi)||[])});
parameters.jsonSchemaExample: {"text":"2 passengers from Aluva to MG Road tomorrow at 8"}

parameters.jsCode: const input = $input.item.json; const pre = $('Execute Workflow Trigger').first().json; const message = String(input.output ?? 'Sorry, I could not prepare a response. Please try again.').trim(); return [{ json: { phoneNumber: pre.phoneNumber, outboundMessage: message.slice(0, 1500), loggedAt: $now.toISO(), userMessage: pre.userMessage, responseTimeMs: Date.now() - new Date(pre.receivedAt).getTime(), intent: 'assistant_response', origin: '', destination: '' } }];
return [{ json: { phoneNumber: $json.phoneNumber, outboundMessage: 'Sorry, MetroMind currently supports text messages only. Please send your request as a text message.' } }];

parameters.description: Book a Kochi Metro ticket. Use only when the user has provided ALL four required values: a valid booking URL (from prutech.org), an origin station, a destination station, and a passenger count. Do NOT call this tool unless all four are confirmed — never invent a missing value. Returns the booking result including a payment URL or deeplink on success, or an error message on failure.

value.destination: ={{ $fromAI('destination_station', 'The validated destination station name (e.g. Palarivattom, Vyttila)', 'string') }}
value.origin: ={{ $fromAI('origin_station', 'The validated origin station name (e.g. Aluva, MG Road)', 'string') }}
value.passengers: ={{ $fromAI('passenger_count', 'Number of passengers as an integer between 1 and 10', 'number') }}
value.url: ={{ $fromAI('booking_url', 'The KMRL booking URL from prutech.org supplied by the user. Never invent this.', 'string') }}

parameters.description: Plan a trip on the Kochi Metro, find routes, calculate fares, and get next trains. Use this tool for ANY destination or origin (including stations, landmarks, addresses, malls, etc). The tool automatically handles geocoding and finding the nearest station.

value.latitude: ={{ $fromAI('latitude', 'The latitude of the user if they shared their location recently, else empty string', 'string') }}
value.longitude: ={{ $fromAI('longitude', 'The longitude of the user if they shared their location recently, else empty string', 'string') }}
value.userMessage: ={{ $fromAI("query", "The exact destination and origin requested. CRITICAL: Use their exact words for places (e.g. if they say \"lulu mall\", output \"lulu mall\"). DO NOT replace landmarks with station names! If they provide a location, leave it exactly as they typed it.") }}

name: MetroMind — WhatsApp Agent
description: MetroMind is a modular WhatsApp AI agent for Kochi Metro, using OpenRouter GPT-4, Simple Memory, tool calling, resilient media handling, and optional Google Sheets logging.

nodes.name: Preprocess Message
nodes.notes: Normalizes Twilio’s inbound event once, preserves the sender identity, and deliberately keeps media out of the AI context.

options.systemMessage:
You are a transit intent extractor for Kochi Metro, Kerala, India.

Extract travel intent from the user message and return ONLY a raw JSON object. No markdown. No backticks. No explanation. Just JSON.

Kochi Metro stations — if the user mentions any, use EXACT name from this list:
Aluva, Pulinchodu, Companypady, Ambattukavu, Muttom, Kalamassery, Cochin University, Pathadipalam, Edapally, Changampuzha Park, Palarivattom, JLN Stadium, Kaloor, Town Hall, MG Road, Maharajas College, Ernakulam South, Kadavanthra, Elamkulam, Vyttila, Thykoodam, Pettah, Vadakkekotta, SN Junction, Tripunithura

Return this exact JSON:
{
  "destination_place": string,
  "destination_is_station": boolean,
  "origin_place": string or null,
  "origin_is_station": boolean,
  "passengers": number,
  "requested_arrival_time": string or null,
  "requested_departure_time": string or null,
  "is_location_shared": boolean
}

Rules:
- destination_place: where they want to go. Metro station → exact name from list. Real place → common name only, no address.
- destination_is_station: true only if destination is one of the 25 stations above
- origin_place: null if they shared GPS. Only fill if they explicitly named an origin.
- origin_is_station: true only if origin is one of the 25 stations
- passengers: default 1 if not mentioned
- requested_arrival_time: 24hr format like 22:30 or null if they want to arrive BY a time
- requested_departure_time: 24hr format like 08:00 or null if they want to leave AT a certain time (e.g., tomorrow at 8am -> "08:00")
- is_location_shared: true if message contains coordinates, mentions sharing location, or if [Coordinates provided: Yes] is present

Examples:
Input: I want to go to Lulu Mall, 2 people
Output: {"destination_place":"Lulu Mall","destination_is_station":false,"origin_place":null,"origin_is_station":false,"passengers":2,"requested_arrival_time":null,"is_location_shared":false}

Input: Take me from Aluva to MG Road
Output: {"destination_place":"MG Road","destination_is_station":true,"origin_place":"Aluva","origin_is_station":true,"passengers":1,"requested_arrival_time":null,"is_location_shared":false}

Input: Need to reach General Hospital by 10:30pm, 3 people
Output: {"destination_place":"General Hospital Kochi","destination_is_station":false,"origin_place":null,"origin_is_station":false,"passengers":3,"requested_arrival_time":"22:30","requested_departure_time":null,"is_location_shared":false}

Input: Tomorrow at 8am from Aluva to Lulu Mall
Output: {"destination_place":"Lulu Mall","destination_is_station":false,"origin_place":"Aluva","origin_is_station":true,"passengers":1,"requested_arrival_time":null,"requested_departure_time":"08:00","is_location_shared":false}

Input: Vyttila to Tripunithura
Output: {"destination_place":"Tripunithura","destination_is_station":true,"origin_place":"Vyttila","origin_is_station":true,"passengers":1,"requested_arrival_time":null,"is_location_shared":false}
